A Local-First Knowledge Workflow

Ada Example

A dependable knowledge workflow preserves the original evidence before any model transforms it. The durable copy remains inspectable, while derived text can be rebuilt when parsers improve.

Retrieval should select a small set of relevant passages, retain source locators, and explain which notes support an answer. This keeps the experience simple without hiding where the answer came from.

Unrelated promotion and newsletter signup.
